name: Yapily
description: Enterprise open banking API connecting to 2,000+ banks across 19 European countries.

seo.title: Yapily — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Yapily: Enterprise open banking API connecting to 2,000+ banks across 19 European countries.

when_to_use: Enterprise open banking API across 2,000+ European banks
PSD2-compliant AIS and PIS for UK and EU fintech apps
Account data and payment initiation for enterprise software
White-label open banking connectivity for financial platforms
Multi-country bank aggregation with normalized data models

pros: 2,000+ European bank connections via one API
Strong PSD2 and regulatory compliance posture
Clean API design popular with enterprises
cons: Europe-only; no US or APAC coverage
Fewer categorization and enrichment features than rivals
UK open banking exit post-PSD2 adds uncertainty
review.verdict: Clean, enterprise-grade open banking API for Europe, if you can stomach the pricing and Europe-only scope.
review.best_for: Enterprise fintechs and banks building European open banking products
review.not_for: Startups on tight budgets or companies needing global bank coverage
